title: What is Outcry, new AI app built for activists?
description: Micah White, the 'Occupy Wall Street' co-creator, has launched a new artificial intelligence (AI) app called Outcry.

title: Microsoft Set to Unveil New AI Coding Model at Build Developer Conference
description: Microsoft is preparing to unveil a new AI coding model that is anticipated to directly compete with existing tools from OpenAI and Anthropic. This announcement is set to take place during the company’s annual Build developer conference in San Francisco next week. The event is expected to feature several significant updates related to AI technology. [...] The post Microsoft Set to Unveil New AI Coding Model at Build Developer Conference appeared first on The CSR Journal .

title: AWS enables retailers to build AI shopping assistants on its cloud
description: AWS is making Amazon’s AI shopping tech available via its cloud so retailers can build conversational shopping assistants without building the system from scratch. The post AWS enables retailers to build AI shopping assistants on its cloud appeared first on Retail Insight Network .

title: Visa’s Pismo Says AI Has Exposed Banking’s Old Tech Problem
description: Watch more: What’s Next in Payments With Pismo’s Leonardo Collado Legacy systems rarely become visible until they begin to slow everything around them. For decades, the banking and payments sectors treated core infrastructure as proof of endurance and discipline. Now the same systems that carried the industry into the digital era are being scrutinized [...] The post Visa’s Pismo Says AI Has Exposed Banking’s Old Tech Problem appeared first on PYMNTS.com .
